content.query:
CREATE VIEW         v_Brand_Item
-- drop view v_Brand_Item
AS
SELECT                          DISTINCT [Brand Short Name]
,                               [Brand] as [Master Data Brand]
,                               [Finance Brand] as [Master Data Finance Brand]
,                               CASE WHEN [Finance Brand] IN ('AFS', 'Admiral Craft', 'Orien', 'Oto', 'Bevles', 'Blakeslee') then 'Commercial'
                                WHEN [Finance Brand] IN ('Avanti', 'Vinotemp') then 'Compact'
                                WHEN [Finance Brand] IN ('Edgecraft') then 'Countertop'
                                WHEN [Finance Brand] IN ('EMC') then 'International'
                                WHEN [Finance Brand] IN ('Shared Services') then 'Shared Services'
                                ELSE 'Undefined' END as [Master Data Division]
FROM
(                                
SELECT          DISTINCT ITCL as [Brand Short Name]
,               CASE WHEN       ITCL = 'ADM' THEN 'Admiral Craft'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'APX' THEN 'Apex'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'ARG' THEN 'Argus'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'AVA' THEN 'Avanti'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'BAR' THEN 'Barmaid'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'BAT' THEN 'Bartec'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'BDM' THEN 'Black Diamond'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'BER' THEN 'Berg'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'BEV' THEN 'Bevles'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'BLA' THEN 'Blakeslee'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'BRA' THEN 'Brama'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'CEN' THEN 'Centaur'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'CEXC' THEN 'Excalibur - Commercial'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'CHF' THEN 'Chefs Choice'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'COME' THEN 'Omega - Commercial'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'CUL' THEN 'Culitek'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'DUUC' THEN 'Duura - Compact'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'DUUR' THEN 'Duura - Commercial'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'EDG' THEN 'Edgecraft'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'ELE' THEN 'Element'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'EMC' THEN 'EMC'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'EPI' THEN 'Epicureanist'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'EXC' THEN 'Excalibur'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'GEN' THEN 'General'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'GRI' THEN 'Grista'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'KEN' THEN 'Kenneeco'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'LEG' THEN 'Legion'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'LUN' THEN 'Lunar Ice'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'MAG' THEN 'Magic Cool'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'MIS' THEN 'Miscellaneous'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'MXC' THEN 'Maxx Cold'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'MXI' THEN 'Maxx Ice'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'MXM' THEN 'Maxximum'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'NS' THEN 'Non-Stocked'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'OME' THEN 'Omega'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'ORI' THEN 'Orien'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'OTO' THEN 'Oto'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'PAT' THEN 'Patriot'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'PGEN' THEN 'General - Private Label'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'PMXC' THEN 'Maxx Cold - Private Label'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'PMXI' THEN 'Maxx Ice - Private Label'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'POME' THEN 'Omega - Private Label'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'QUA' THEN 'Qualite'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'SAP' THEN 'Sapphire'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'SLA' THEN 'Sir Lawrence'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'UST' THEN 'U-Star'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'VIN' THEN 'Vinturi'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'VNT' THEN 'Vinotemp'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'VNTC' THEN 'Vinotemp - Custom'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'WES' THEN 'Westbend'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'WESC' THEN 'Westbend - Compact'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'WIN' THEN 'Winemate'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'YON' THEN 'Yonanas'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'ZER' THEN 'Zeroll'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'ZZZ' THEN 'Shared Services'
                ELSE            'Undefined' end as [Brand]
,               CASE WHEN       ITCL IN ('ADM', 'ARG', 'BDM', 'BER', 'CUL', 'GRI', 'KEN',
                                         'LUN', 'PAT', 'QUA', 'SLA', 'UST') THEN 'Admiral Craft'
                WHEN            ITCL IN ('AVA', 'DUUC', 'MAG', 'WESC') THEN 'Avanti'
                WHEN            ITCL IN ('APX', 'BRA', 'ELE', 'EPI', 'VNT', 'VNTC', 'WIN') THEN 'Vinotemp'
                WHEN            ITCL IN ('CEN', 'CEXC', 'COME', 'DUUR', 'GEN', 'MXC', 
                                         'MXI', 'PGEN', 'PMXC', 'PMXI', 'POME', 'SAP', 
                                         'BAR', 'BAT', 'LEG', 'MXM') THEN 'AFS'
                WHEN            ITCL IN ('BEV') THEN 'Bevles'
                WHEN            ITCL IN ('BLA') THEN 'Blakeslee'
                WHEN            ITCL IN ('CHF', 'EDG', 'EXC', 'OME', 'VIN', 'WES', 'YON', 'ZER') THEN 'Edgecraft'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'EMC' THEN 'EMC'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'ORI' THEN 'Orien'
                WHEN            ITCL = 'OTO' THEN 'Oto'
                WHEN            ITCL IN ('MIS', 'NS', 'ZZZ') THEN 'Shared Services'
                ELSE            'Undefined' end as [Finance Brand]
FROM            M3.MITMAS
) A

UNION

SELECT          [Brand Short Name]
,               [Brand] as [Master Data Brand]
,               [Finance Brand] as [Master Data Finance Brand]
,               CASE WHEN [Finance Brand] in ('Avanti', 'Vinotemp') then 'Compact'
                WHEN [Finance Brand] = 'Edgecraft' then 'Countertop'
                ELSE 'Undefined' end as [Master Data Division]
FROM
(
SELECT          DISTINCT USER_1 AS      [Brand Short Name]
,               CASE WHEN USER_1 = 'AVANTI' THEN 'Avanti'
                WHEN USER_1 = 'CHEFS CHOICE' THEN 'Chefs Choice'
                WHEN USER_1 = 'EDGECRAFT' THEN 'Edgecraft'
                WHEN USER_1 = 'ELEMENT' THEN 'Element'
                WHEN USER_1 = 'OMEGA' THEN 'Omega'
                WHEN USER_1 = 'VINTURI' THEN 'Vinturi'
                WHEN USER_1 = 'VINTURI COMPACT' THEN 'Vinturi - Compact'
                WHEN USER_1 = 'WESTBEND' THEN 'Westbend'
                WHEN USER_1 = 'WESTBEND COMPACT' THEN 'Westbend - Compact'
                WHEN USER_1 = 'YONANAS' THEN 'Yonanas'
                WHEN USER_1 = 'DUURA' THEN 'Duura - Compact'
                WHEN USER_1 = 'TLC' THEN 'TLC'
                WHEN USER_1 = 'OTHER' THEN 'Other'
                WHEN USER_1 = 'ZEROLL' THEN 'Zeroll'
                WHEN USER_1 = 'VINOTEMP' THEN 'Vinotemp'
                ELSE 'Undefined' END as [Brand]
,               CASE WHEN USER_1 IN ('AVANTI', 'VINTURI COMPACT', 'WESTBEND COMPACT', 'DUURA') then 'Avanti'
                WHEN USER_1 IN ('CHEFS CHOICE', 'EDGECRAFT', 'OMEGA', 'VINTURI', 'WESTBEND', 'YONANAS', 'TLC', 'OTHER', 'ZEROLL') THEN 'Edgecraft'
                WHEN USER_1 IN ('VINOTEMP', 'ELEMENT') THEN 'Vinotemp'
                ELSE 'Undefined' END AS [Finance Brand]
FROM            ECM.PART
)
A

UNION

SELECT          [Brand Short Name]
,               [Brand] as [Master Data Brand]
,               [Finance Brand] as [Master Data Finance Brand]
,               CASE WHEN [Finance Brand] in ('Avanti', 'Vinotemp') then 'Compact'
                WHEN [Finance Brand] = 'Edgecraft' then 'Countertop'
                WHEN [Finance Brand] IN ('Bevles', 'Blakeslee', 'AFS', 'Admiral Craft') then 'Commercial'
                WHEN [Finance Brand] = 'EMC' then 'International'
                ELSE 'Undefined' end as [Master Data Division]
FROM
(
SELECT          DISTINCT ProductClass AS      [Brand Short Name]
,               CASE WHEN ProductClass in
                ('BARM', 'CHIC', 'CRAT', 'CRTP', 'DADE', 'DITO',
                 'DOUG', 'META', 'FMP', 'FWE', 'GRIN', 'GRNP',
                 'HENPEN', 'LAKE', 'ZMIS', 'ROBP', 'ROBO', 'SERVI',
                 'SERVIP', 'SERVP', 'SPMD', 'THERTEK', 'TRAE',
                 'VOGT', 'VOLR', 'WOOD', 'STOE', 'BERTHA') THEN 'EMC'
                 WHEN ProductClass IN
                ('BEVL', 'BEVP', 'bevles') THEN 'Bevles'
                WHEN ProductClass IN
                ('BLAK', 'BLAP') THEN 'Blakeslee'
                WHEN ProductClass IN
                ('EXKD') THEN 'Excalibur - Commercial'
                WHEN ProductClass IN
                ('GENC', 'GENP', 'GENH', 'GENM', 'GNMP', 'GENS', 'GNSP') THEN 'General'
                WHEN ProductClass IN
                ('LEGX', 'LEGI', 'LGXP') THEN 'Legion'
                WHEN ProductClass IN
                ('MAXC', 'MAXE', 'MAXF', 'MAXH', 'MXCD', 'MXCR',
                 'MXXR', 'SANTA', 'MAXP', 'MXCP', 'MXXP') THEN 'Maxx Cold'
                WHEN ProductClass IN
                ('MICE', 'MICP') THEN 'Maxx Ice'
                WHEN ProductClass IN
                ('OCOMM') THEN 'Omega - Commercial'
                WHEN ProductClass IN
                ('ADMIRAL') THEN 'Admiral Craft'
                WHEN ProductClass IN
                ('AVAN') THEN 'Avanti'
                WHEN ProductClass IN
                ('VINO') THEN 'Vinotemp'
                WHEN ProductClass IN
                ('CHEF') THEN 'Chefs Choice'
                WHEN ProductClass IN
                ('EXCL') THEN 'Excalibur'
                WHEN ProductClass IN
                ('OMEG') THEN 'Omega'
                WHEN ProductClass IN
                ('WEST') THEN 'Westbend'
                WHEN ProductClass IN
                ('VINT') THEN 'Vinturi'
                WHEN ProductClass IN
                ('YONA', 'YONP') THEN 'Yonanas'
                WHEN ProductClass IN
                ('ZERO') THEN 'Zeroll'
                ELSE 'Undefined' END as [Brand]
,               CASE WHEN ProductClass IN ('AVAN') then 'Avanti'
                WHEN ProductClass IN ('ZERO', 'YONA', 'YONP', 'VINT', 'WEST', 'OMEG', 'EXCL', 'CHEF') THEN 'Edgecraft'
                WHEN ProductClass IN ('VINO') THEN 'Vinotemp'
                WHEN ProductClass IN ('BEVL', 'BEVP', 'bevles') THEN 'Bevles'
                WHEN ProductClass IN ('BLAK', 'BLAP') THEN 'Blakeslee'
                WHEN ProductCLass IN ('GENC', 'GENP', 'GENH', 'GENM', 'GNMP', 'GENS', 'GNSP',
                                      'EXKD', 'OCOMM', 'LEGX', 'LEGI', 'LGXP', 'MICE', 'MICP',
                                      'MAXC', 'MAXE', 'MAXF', 'MAXH', 'MXCD', 'MXCR', 'MXXR', 
                                      'SANTA', 'MAXP', 'MXCP', 'MXXP') THEN 'AFS'
                WHEN ProductClass IN ('ADMIRAL') THEN 'Admiral Craft'
                WHEN ProductClass in
                ('BARM', 'CHIC', 'CRAT', 'CRTP', 'DADE', 'DITO',
                 'DOUG', 'META', 'FMP', 'FWE', 'GRIN', 'GRNP',
                 'HENPEN', 'LAKE', 'ZMIS', 'ROBP', 'ROBO', 'SERVI',
                 'SERVIP', 'SERVP', 'SPMD', 'THERTEK', 'TRAE',
                 'VOGT', 'VOLR', 'WOOD', 'STOE', 'BERTHA') THEN 'EMC'
                ELSE 'Undefined' END AS [Finance Brand]
FROM            SCG.InvMaster
)
A
